layout_strategy.description: Three-column documentation layout: Left sidebar (navigation), Center (content max 800px), Right sidebar (on-page TOC). High emphasis on whitespace, typography, and readability.
layout_strategy.sidebar: Fixed 280px width, sticky, hidden on mobile (replaced by hamburger menu/Sheet).
layout_strategy.header: Sticky glassmorphism header (backdrop-blur-md) with logo, search trigger, theme toggle, and Admin link.
layout_strategy.spacing: Generous spacing: p-8 or p-12 for content areas. Content sections separated by generous margins (e.g., mt-12, mb-8).

components.search: Shadcn Dialog + Command for global document search
components.editor: react-quill or tiptap for Admin Rich Text Editing
components.markdown: react-markdown with remark-gfm for rendering docs, react-syntax-highlighter for code blocks

documentation_reader.layout: Left Sidebar + Main Content + Right TOC
features: Navigation tree with categories and active states
Markdown rendering (H1-H4, blockquotes, lists, code blocks)
On-page Table of Contents that highlights current section on scroll

admin_login.layout: Centered Card overlay on abstract background
features: Uses image_urls.admin_login_background as the full-screen background with an overlay
Create/Edit document view with Title input, Category select, and Rich Text/Markdown Editor

admin_login_background.description: Dynamic abstract photograph of blue light patterns with a dark backdrop, creating a sense of motion and mystery.

design_system_rules.buttons: Flat design, rounded-md. Primary buttons use the exact primary color for the active theme, with hover states mapped to the corresponding lighter/darker shade.
design_system_rules.cards: Subtle borders (1px solid border color) and very soft shadows in light mode, no shadows and slightly lighter surface color in dark mode.
design_system_rules.code_blocks: Dark background (#0A0B0F) for code blocks in both themes to maintain developer aesthetic, with syntax highlighting.
design_system_rules.testing: All interactive elements must include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Configure tailwind.config.js to use the exact colors defined in this JSON for light and dark themes using CSS variables.
Implement next-themes or similar for dark/light mode toggling.
Translate the reference content from docs.verasist.online into Turkish as requested.
Ensure the admin dashboard has a functional (mock or real) JWT login and document management system.
Follow the specific typography choices by importing Outfit, Work Sans, and JetBrains Mono from Google Fonts.
